tokens.description: unit-04 token-scoped banned-pattern audit — enforces the DESIGN-TOKENS §1.1a banned-pairs + §1.4 typography floor + §1.7 disabled-opacity ban + §2.6 canonical button verbs.

rules.description: text-[9px] / text-[10px] banned on user-facing info (WCAG 1.4.4 Resize Text)
text-gray-* banned in SPA (use text-stone-* or semantic tokens)
text-stone-400 without a dark: qualifier collapses below 4.5:1 on any light card surface (DESIGN-TOKENS §1.1a)
dark:text-stone-400 paired with dark:bg-stone-800 collapses to ~4.4:1 (AA FAIL for body text per DESIGN-TOKENS §1.1a). Lift to dark:text-stone-300 (≥ 10:1).
bg-teal-600 paired with text-white on the same element fails WCAG 1.4.3 AA (3.74:1 < 4.5:1). Use bg-teal-700 text-white (5.47:1). See DESIGN-TOKENS §1.1b (FB-55).

dark:bg-teal-500 paired with text-white on the same element collapses to 2.49:1 — below both 3:1 UI-nontext floor and 4.5:1 text floor. Use dark:bg-teal-700 text-white. See DESIGN-TOKENS §1.1b (FB-55).

FAB count badge `bg-amber-100 text-amber-700` = 3.68:1 — AA FAIL for 12px bold text per DESIGN-TOKENS §1.1a. Canonical pair is `bg-amber-100 text-amber-800` (6.37:1 AA pass). Scoped narrowly to FeedbackFloatingButton.tsx per FB-70 — the pair is legal elsewhere (e.g. button hover-bg surfaces on white). Matches the token pair in either order.

bg-teal-500 paired with text-white on AnnotationCanvas pin markers = 2.22:1 (WCAG 1.4.3 + 1.4.11 FAIL) per FB-58. Canonical pin fill is the rose-600 token via --color-annotation-pin-bg (see index.css @theme + annotation-pin PAIRS in audit-contrast.mjs). Scoped narrowly to AnnotationCanvas.tsx to avoid false positives on the unrelated focus-ring usages of teal-500 elsewhere.
opacity-50|60|70 on interactive/card roots (use token-based disabled per DESIGN-TOKENS §1.7)
disabled:opacity-* (any) banned — α-composite collapses text contrast below AA
focus:ring-1 banned (use focus-visible:ring-2)
w-80 + (lg|xl):w-96 drift; use canonical w-[var(--sidebar-width)] xl:w-[var(--sidebar-width-xl)]
max-w-[1400px] literal; use max-w-[var(--content-max)]
Reject/Close/Address/Re-open banned as literal button text (DESIGN-TOKENS §2.6); canonical verbs are Dismiss / Verify & Close / Reopen
Reject/Close/Address/Re-open banned as aria-label (DESIGN-TOKENS §2.6)

stage-wide.description: unit-15 stage-wide audit superset — reserved. Adds the sharpened {origin} JSX regex and 'Show agent feedback' (?! inline) sentinel plus any downstream-component bans.

rules.description: bare {origin} JSX without originLabels[origin] — render the human label, not the raw slug (unit-15 / DESIGN-TOKENS §2.2)
copy must be 'Show agent feedback inline' (trailing word preserves the inline-interleaved semantics)
AgentFeedbackToggle.tsx MUST contain the canonical 'Show agent feedback inline' string at least once (presence-side check per unit-09 Completion Criteria).

tabindex="-1" banned on AnnotationCanvas pin markers — unit-13 regression guard for the 'pin-markers-at-tabindex-negative-one' class of bug. Pin <button>s MUST carry tabindex="0". Scope retargeted to runtime canvas after FB-11 cutover deleted the orphaned pages/review/AnnotationCanvas.tsx.
XSS sinks (dangerouslySetInnerHTML / innerHTML / eval / new Function / document.write) banned in the annotation review path — unit-13 XSS hardening.
XSS sinks banned across haiku-ui and haiku-api source. Allow-list via inline `// audit-allow: <reason>`.
Hyphenated 'Re-open' banned — DESIGN-TOKENS §2.6 canonical verb is 'Reopen' (one word). Case-sensitive so prose sentences with lowercase 're-open' pass.

Raw hex colors banned in haiku-ui sources. Tokens must route through CSS custom properties (index.css @theme) or Tailwind utilities. Allow-list via inline `// audit-allow: <reason>` for 3rd-party renderer configs (mermaid, xyflow, canvas 2D). FB-42: src/index.css is no longer blanket-excluded — every component-level hex must be promoted to a named token in @theme.
Solitary `lg:w-96` (without preceding `w-80`) banned on sidebar-relevant files — canonical breakpoint is `xl:w-96` or `w-[var(--sidebar-width)]`.

Any file that renders role="tab" MUST also apply focusRingClass (or an explicit focus-visible:ring-* class) so arrow-key-traversed tab buttons have a visible focus indicator (WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible). Regression guard for FB-67.

FB-71 stage-wide regression guard — any `bg-teal-(100|200|300|400|500|600)` class paired with `text-white` on the same element fails WCAG AA (4.5:1). Canonical passing teal + white combinations are `bg-teal-700` (5.47:1) or `bg-teal-800` (7.26:1). Applied across the entire haiku-ui source so a new colored button or badge cannot silently reintroduce the FB-55 / FB-58 gap the per-component bans already catch. Matches either ordering within the same class attribute.

FB-71 stage-wide regression guard — any `bg-emerald-(100|200|300|400|500|600)` paired with `text-white` on the same element fails WCAG AA (emerald-400 + white = 1.63:1 — FB-61; emerald-600 + white = 3.85:1). Canonical fix is `bg-emerald-700` text-white (5.10:1).
